markdown:
## Summary

Third opening-Ground orientation pass for run 0013, focus **T9** (Jacobian⇄Albanese endgame glue). No Horizon has run yet, so there is no diff to reconcile. The two prior Ground sessions (0001, 0003) already produced a thorough, accurate T9 map (memory `I-0112` + its this-run comment). I re-confirmed the port state structurally and found no drift.

## Progress

- `.../0005-ground/recommendation.md`: written — concise T9 orientation building on prior passes, not duplicating.
- `SubProjects/Albanese/.../{PolePurity,SmoothPrimeRegularity,StandardSmoothDimension}.lean`: confirmed present only in SUB, absent from AJC — port still pending.
- `AJC/.../AlbaneseUP.lean`: confirmed imports only `Mathlib` + `Genus` — extension step still `sorry`d, wiring is the substantive T9 work.
- Inbox: no change — `I-0112`/`I-0114` already cover the leg; ~14 open memory items are all live durable recipes, so no forced pruning.
- Blueprint: no change — duplicate-label defect stays tracked in `I-0114` (deferred, needs design-aware cref surgery).

## Issues

- Duplicate `\label{thm:albanese_universal_property}` across `Albanese_AlbaneseUP.tex:99` and `Jacobian.tex:490` (`I-0114`, open to human) — unresolved by design.
- Open memory count (~14) is slightly above the ~10 guidance, but every item is a live durable recipe; archiving would lose value.
- No full AJC `lake build` run this session; ported bodies must be kernel-verified (`#print axioms`) at merge.
- Raw `grep -c sorry` is noisy (comment/docstring hits); relied on prior sessions' careful real-sorry counts, which are unchanged.

## Why I stopped

Task complete: orientation for T9 is done and re-confirmed with no drift; the two prior passes plus `I-0112` already give Horizon everything needed. As a supervisor/janitor (not the prover), there is no further reconcile work absent a Horizon diff, and forcing inbox/blueprint edits would only churn a well-curated state.

## Next

- Horizon: port the 3 SUB support files into AJC `Albanese/`, swap in SUB bodies of `CodimOneExtension`/`Thm32`, then wire the extension import into `AlbaneseUP.descentThroughBirationalSigma`.
- Deep remainder: Milne 3.3 substep-4b (`indeterminacy_pure_codim_one_into_grpScheme`).
- Human: decide the intended DAG edge for the duplicate label in `I-0114` (distinct north-star label vs `\uses`).
recommendation:
# Orientation — Run 0013, T9 (Jacobian⇄Albanese endgame glue)

- Useful context: memory `I-0112` (with its this-run comment `C-0001`) is the authoritative map for T9 — the `Albanese` subproject is ahead of AJC on the rational-map-extension leg. This is the third opening-Ground pass; the port shape was re-confirmed structurally this session with no drift (no Horizon has run yet).

- Relevant files: the port is self-contained under `SubProjects/Albanese/AlgebraicJacobian/Albanese/` → `MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/AlgebraicJacobian/Albanese/`. The three sorry-free support files `PolePurity.lean`, `SmoothPrimeRegularity.lean`, `StandardSmoothDimension.lean` exist only in SUB (verified absent from AJC this session); they import only `Mathlib` + AJC-present `AuslanderBuchsbaum`/`CoheightBridge`, and SUB `CodimOneExtension` adds just their 3 imports over the AJC copy. SUB `Thm32RationalMapExtension.lean` is materially ahead of the AJC copy.

- Assembly note: `AlbaneseUP.lean` imports only `Mathlib` + `AlgebraicJacobian.Genus` (confirmed this session), so `descentThroughBirationalSigma` currently `sorry`s the extension step rather than consuming `thm:rational_map_to_av_extends` (Thm32). Wiring that import and applying the extension theorem inside `descentThroughBirationalSigma` is the substantive T9 work; `bundle := sorry` (~line 183) is representability-gated and out of T9 scope per the task objective. The sole deep remainder on the extension leg is Milne 3.3 substep-4b (`indeterminacy_pure_codim_one_into_grpScheme`, diagonal-intersection bound).

- Consistency / recipes: `WeilDivisor.lean`'s `PrimeDivisor`/`RationalMap.order` substrate is a live dependency of the codim-1 leg (`I-0106`) — not dead genus-0 weight. Related memory: `I-0065` (honest Milne 3.1/3.3 chain; the FALSE `codimOneFree ⇒ extension` statement — never re-add), `I-0061`/`I-0082` (tangentSpaceIso path, neighbouring T10). Blueprint: `I-0114` tracks a duplicate `\label{thm:albanese_universal_property}` across `Albanese_AlbaneseUP.tex:99` and `Jacobian.tex:490`, deferred for design-aware cref surgery. Kernel-verify (`#print axioms`) any ported bodies on merge; a full AJC `lake build` was not run this session.
